headlines.title: Exclusive: British Museum made false claims about its removal of ‘Palestine’ from displays
headlines.snippet: Exclusive: British Museum made false claims about its removal of ‘Palestine’ from displays The British Museum removed the terms “ Palestine ”, “Palestinian” and “Israelite occupation” from its displays in direct response to months of lobbying in 2024, a Middle East Eye investigation has found.

headlines.title: Seafarers face ‘significant risk’ in Strait of Hormuz, unions say
headlines.snippet: Seafarers face ‘significant risk’ in Strait of Hormuz, unions say The International Transport Workers’ Federation and the Joint Negotiating Group have agreed to keep the Strait of Hormuz classified as a “Warlike Operations Area” until 9 July.
